---
title: Bayesian Statistics
description: "Bayesian inference from first principles: priors, likelihoods, posteriors, MCMC, and practical model building with Stan and brms"
---

Bayesian methods treat unknown quantities as random variables with probability distributions updated by data. The approach yields direct probability statements about parameters, principled uncertainty for predictions, and a natural framework for combining evidence across studies.

This area develops Bayesian thinking from its axiomatic foundations, through conjugate examples that can be worked by hand, to modern MCMC-based fitting of complex models using `rstan` and `brms`. Emphasis is placed on prior choice, posterior diagnostics, and the interpretation of posterior summaries in a research report.

## Coverage

- The Bayesian update: prior, likelihood, posterior, and posterior predictive distribution
- Conjugate models: beta-binomial, normal-normal, gamma-Poisson
- Informative, weakly informative, and reference priors; prior-predictive checks
- Posterior summaries: credible intervals, highest posterior density regions, Bayes factors
- MCMC methods: Metropolis-Hastings, Gibbs sampling, Hamiltonian Monte Carlo
- Convergence diagnostics: R-hat, effective sample size, trace plots, divergence checks in Stan
- Bayesian linear and generalised linear models via `brms` and `rstanarm`
- Bayesian mixed-effects and hierarchical models
- Bayesian model comparison: WAIC, LOO-CV, Bayes factors
- Bayesian hypothesis testing and the Savage-Dickey ratio
- Posterior predictive checks for model criticism

Every model is fit end-to-end: prior specification, sampling, diagnostics, posterior summaries, and manuscript reporting. The `tidybayes` and `bayesplot` packages are used for tabulation and visualisation throughout.

<!-- card-grid-injected -->

## Tutorials

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayes Factors](bayes-factors.qmd)
Ratio of marginal likelihoods under two models, the Bayesian analogue of a likelihood-ratio test
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayes' Theorem for Parameters](bayes-theorem-for-parameters.qmd)
Using Bayes' theorem to update beliefs about parameters given data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian ANOVA](bayesian-anova.qmd)
Posterior inference on group differences with credible intervals and contrast comparisons
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Hierarchical Models](bayesian-hierarchical-intro.qmd)
Partial pooling through prior structure for grouped / multilevel data
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Hypothesis Testing](bayes-hypothesis-testing.qmd)
Region of practical equivalence (ROPE) and Bayes factors for Bayesian decisions
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Linear Regression](linear-regression-bayes.qmd)
Linear regression with priors on coefficients, fit via MCMC in brms or rstanarm
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Logistic Regression](logistic-regression-bayes.qmd)
Logistic regression with MCMC-based posterior for binary outcomes
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Mediation Analysis](bayesian-mediation.qmd)
Testing indirect effects with posterior samples
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Meta-Analysis](bayesian-meta-analysis.qmd)
Hierarchical meta-analysis with explicit prior on between-study heterogeneity
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Bayesian Mixed Models](bayesian-mixed-models.qmd)
Multilevel regression with random effects, fit via Bayesian MCMC
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Conjugate Priors](conjugate-priors.qmd)
When the prior and posterior share the same distributional family: the beta-binomial, normal-normal, and gamma-Poisson models
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Credible Intervals](credible-intervals.qmd)
Bayesian analogue of confidence intervals: equal-tailed and highest-posterior-density regions
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Divergences and Pairs Plots](divergences-pairs-plots.qmd)
Diagnosing HMC sampling problems via divergent transitions and pair-plot visualisations
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Gibbs Sampling](gibbs-sampling.qmd)
MCMC via sequential sampling from conditional distributions
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Hamiltonian Monte Carlo](hamiltonian-monte-carlo.qmd)
Gradient-based MCMC using Hamiltonian dynamics; NUTS variant in Stan
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Highest Posterior Density Interval](hpd-interval.qmd)
Shortest interval containing a specified posterior probability mass
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Informative Priors](informative-priors.qmd)
Priors derived from previous studies, expert elicitation, or mechanistic knowledge
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Jeffreys' Prior](jeffreys-prior.qmd)
Invariant reference prior proportional to the square root of the Fisher information
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation](loo-cv.qmd)
Efficient Bayesian LOO-CV via Pareto-smoothed importance sampling (PSIS-LOO)
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Metropolis-Hastings](metropolis-hastings.qmd)
The foundational MCMC algorithm with proposal distribution and accept/reject rule
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Posterior Mean and Variance](posterior-mean-variance.qmd)
Point estimates and uncertainty summaries from a posterior distribution
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Posterior Predictive Checks](posterior-predictive-checks.qmd)
Comparing simulated data from the fitted model to observed data for model criticism
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Prior Specification](prior-specification.qmd)
Choosing priors: informative, weakly informative, flat, and the risks of each
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [R-hat and ESS Diagnostics](rhat-ess-diagnostics.qmd)
Convergence (R-hat) and effective sample size (ESS) for MCMC quality control
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Stan: Introduction](stan-introduction.qmd)
Writing probabilistic models in Stan's data-parameters-model blocks
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Beta-Binomial Model](beta-binomial-model.qmd)
Conjugate Bayesian inference for a binomial proportion with a Beta prior
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Gamma-Poisson Model](gamma-poisson-model.qmd)
Conjugate Bayesian inference for a Poisson rate with Gamma prior
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Normal-Normal Model](normal-normal-model.qmd)
Conjugate Bayesian inference for a normal mean with known variance
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Posterior Predictive Distribution](posterior-predictive-distribution.qmd)
Distribution of a new observation integrating over posterior uncertainty about parameters
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [The Savage-Dickey Density Ratio](savage-dickey-ratio.qmd)
Bayes factor for a point null via posterior/prior density ratio
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [WAIC](waic.qmd)
Widely applicable information criterion: Bayesian out-of-sample prediction score
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [Weakly Informative Priors](weakly-informative-priors.qmd)
Priors that regularise without imposing substantive constraints
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [brms Basics](brms-basics.qmd)
High-level R interface to Stan: formula syntax, families, prior specification
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [rstanarm](rstanarm.qmd)
Pre-compiled Stan models with a frequentist-like R interface
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
TUTORIAL
:::
### [tidybayes Workflow](tidybayes-workflow.qmd)
Extract, manipulate, and visualise posterior draws in tidyverse style
:::

:::
